      "Babylon.js: Full PBR and glTF parity: full PBR readiness must be true; full glTF readiness must be true",
      "Babylon.js: Shadow, HDR, and postprocess parity: production shadow-map parity, HDR/render-target parity, and full postprocess-suite parity must all be true",
      "Babylon.js: Real WebGPU hardware parity: full WebGPU parity must include real adapter/device and real WebGPU render/readback evidence",
      "Babylon.js: Unity/Unreal workflow parity: Unity parity, Unreal parity, and replacement readiness must all be true",
      "Babylon.js: Production deployment and independent reproduction: production readiness, clean package install smoke, and provenance evidence must all pass",
      "Babylon.js: Ecosystem, documentation, accessibility, and device matrix: bounded documentation, accessibility, and device-matrix audit must pass; this still does not prove ecosystem superiority"
    ]
  },
